description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 70.

Echoed Spell: When you cast a spell that targets only one creature, you can expend 1 Legendary Point to create a phantasmal echo of the spell that lingers around the targeted creature for a minute. As a bonus action, you can cast the spell again originating from the target without expending a spell slot. You can have only one Echoed Spell active at a time. To be eligible, a spell must be of 9th level or lower and incapable of targeting more than one creature at the spell’s current level. For example, magic missile and scorching ray aren’t eligible, but suggestion and dominate monster are.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
